[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100001111 5
1 0010000011 3
2 0010010000 2
3 0000111110 5
4 0011111110 7
5 1111010101 7
6 1111111111 a
7 1000100011 4
